ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artworks" (
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the artwork */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the artwork */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the artwork was created */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the artwork */,
  "medium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the medium used in the artwork */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards or recognitions received by the artwork */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the artwork, including historical and contextual information */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the artwork was acquired by the gallery */,
  "current_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current location of the artwork */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the artwork */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the artwork */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the artwork */,
  "conservation_history" TEXT /* Detailed history of conservation efforts */,
  "exhibition_history" TEXT /* History of past exhibitions where the artwork was displayed */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Current loan status of the artwork */,
  "loan_to" TEXT /* Institution or gallery to which the artwork is loaned */,
  "loan_return_date" TEXT /* Date the artwork is expected to return from loan */,
  "public_visibility" INTEGER /* Whether the artwork is visible to the public */,
  "copyright_status" TEXT /* Copyright status of the artwork */,
  "source_of_acquisition" TEXT /* Source from which the artwork was acquired */,
  "provenance" TEXT /* Provenance history of the artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_medium_id FOREIGN KEY ("medium_id") REFERENCES mediums ("medium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_current_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist was born */,
  "death_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist died */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the artist */,
  "birthplace" TEXT /* Place of birth */,
  "deathplace" TEXT /* Place of death */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background */,
  "influences" TEXT /* Influences on the artist's work */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards and recognitions received by the artist */,
  "publications" TEXT /* Publications about the artist's work */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the artist's official website */,
  "public_visibility" INTEGER /* Whether the artist's information is visible to the public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  "public_visibility" INTEGER /* Whether the category is visible to the public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mediums" (
  "medium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medium */,
  "medium_name" TEXT /* Name of the medium */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medium */,
  "public_visibility" INTEGER /* Whether the medium is visible to the public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "gallery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gallery where the location is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "public_visibility" INTEGER /* Whether the location is visible to the public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_gallery_id FOREIGN KEY ("gallery_id") REFERENCES galleries ("gallery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "galleries" (
  "gallery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gallery */,
  "gallery_name" TEXT /* Name of the gallery */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gallery */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the gallery */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the gallery */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the gallery */,
  "public_visibility" INTEGER /* Whether the gallery is visible to the public */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the gallery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gallery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibitions" (
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibition */,
  "exhibition_name" TEXT /* Name of the exhibition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the exhibition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the exhibition */,
  "gallery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gallery where the exhibition is held */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the curator of the exhibition */,
  "exhibition_theme" TEXT /* Theme or focus of the exhibition */,
  "public_visibility" INTEGER /* Whether the exhibition is visible to the public */,
  "ticketed" INTEGER /* Whether the exhibition requires a ticket */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "total_visitors" INTEGER /* Total number of visitors to the exhibition */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the exhibition */,
  "reviews" TEXT /* Reviews or feedback from visitors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES curators ("curator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_gallery_id FOREIGN KEY ("gallery_id") REFERENCES galleries ("gallery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curators" (
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curator */,
  "curator_name" TEXT /* Name of the curator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the curator */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization or expertise */,
  "public_visibility" INTEGER /* Whether the curator's information is visible to the public */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the curator */,
  "publications" TEXT /* Publications by the curator */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the curator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibition_artworks" (
  "exhibition_artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibition-artwork relationship */,
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exhibition */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artwork */,
  "display_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the artwork is displayed in the exhibition */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Loan status of the artwork in the exhibition */,
  "loan_to" TEXT /* Institution or gallery to which the artwork is loaned */,
  "loan_return_date" TEXT /* Date the artwork is expected to return from loan */,
  "public_visibility" INTEGER /* Whether the artwork is visible to the public in the exhibition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibition_artworks_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibition_artworks_exhibition_id FOREIGN KEY ("exhibition_id") REFERENCES exhibitions ("exhibition_id")
)
